botSummaries.description: Summary information for the bots that meet the filter criteria specified in the request. The length of the list is specified in the maxResults parameter of the request. If there are more bots available, the nextToken field contains a token to the next page of results.

nextToken.description: A token that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the ListBots operation. If the nextToken field is present, you send the contents as the nextToken parameter of a ListBots operation request to get the next page of results.

botId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the bot by Amazon Lex.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that was exported.

exportSummaries.description: Summary information for the exports that meet the filter criteria specified in the request. The length of the list is specified in the maxResults parameter. If there are more exports available, the nextToken field contains a token to get the next page of results.

nextToken.description: A token that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the ListExports operation. If the nextToken field is present, you send the contents as the nextToken parameter of a ListExports operation request to get the next page of results.

localeId.description: The locale specified in the request.

botId.description: The unique identifier assigned by Amazon Lex to the bot.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that was imported. It will always be DRAFT.

importSummaries.description: Summary information for the imports that meet the filter criteria specified in the request. The length of the list is specified in the maxResults parameter. If there are more imports available, the nextToken field contains a token to get the next page of results.

nextToken.description: A token that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the ListImports operation. If the nextToken field is present, you send the contents as the nextToken parameter of a ListImports operation request to get the next page of results.

localeId.description: The locale specified in the request.

nextToken.description: A token that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the ListTestExecutions operation. If the nextToken field is present, you send the contents as the nextToken parameter of a ListTestExecutions operation request to get the next page of results.

testSets.description: The selected test sets in a list of test sets.

nextToken.description: A token that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the ListTestSets operation. If the nextToken field is present, you send the contents as the nextToken parameter of a ListTestSets operation request to get the next page of results.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that has permission to access the bot.

dataPrivacy.description: Settings for managing data privacy of the bot and its conversations with users.

idleSessionTTLInSeconds.description: The maximum time in seconds that Amazon Lex retains the data gathered in a conversation.

botStatus.description: The current status of the bot. When the status is Available the bot is ready to be used in conversations with users.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot was last updated.

botType.description: The type of the bot that was described.

botMembers.description: The list of bots in the network that was described.

failureReasons.description: If the botStatus is Failed, this contains a list of reasons that the bot couldn't be built.

errorLogSettings.description: Contains the configuration for error logging that specifies where and how bot errors are recorded, including destinations like CloudWatch Logs.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the bot alias.

botAliasLocaleSettings.description: The locale settings that are unique to the alias.

conversationLogSettings.description: Specifics of how Amazon Lex logs text and audio conversations with the bot associated with the alias.

sentimentAnalysisSettings.description: Determines whether Amazon Lex will use Amazon Comprehend to detect the sentiment of user utterances.

botAliasHistoryEvents.description: A list of events that affect a bot alias. For example, an event is recorded when the version that the alias points to changes.

botAliasStatus.description: The current status of the alias. When the alias is Available, the alias is ready for use with your bot.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the bot alias.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the alias was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the alias was last updated.

parentBotNetworks.description: A list of the networks to which the bot alias you described belongs.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the locale.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the locale.

localeId.description: The unique identifier of the described locale.

nluIntentConfidenceThreshold.description: The confidence threshold where Amazon Lex inserts the AMAZON.FallbackIntent and AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent intents in the list of possible intents for an utterance.

voiceSettings.description: The Amazon Polly voice Amazon Lex uses for voice interaction with the user.

intentsCount.description: The number of intents defined for the locale.

slotTypesCount.description: The number of slot types defined for the locale.

botLocaleStatus.description: The status of the bot. If the status is Failed, the reasons for the failure are listed in the failureReasons field.

failureReasons.description: if botLocaleStatus is Failed, Amazon Lex explains why it failed to build the bot.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the locale was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the locale was last updated.

lastBuildSubmittedDateTime.description: The date and time that the locale was last submitted for building.

botLocaleHistoryEvents.description: History of changes, such as when a locale is used in an alias, that have taken place for the locale.

recommendedActions.description: Recommended actions to take to resolve an error in the failureReasons field.

generativeAISettings.description: Contains settings for Amazon Bedrock's generative AI features for your bot locale.

speechDetectionSensitivity.description: The sensitivity level for voice activity detection (VAD) configured for the bot locale.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the bot recommendation.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the bot recommendation.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale of the bot recommendation to describe.

botRecommendationStatus.description: The status of the bot recommendation. If the status is Failed, then the reasons for the failure are listed in the failureReasons field.

botRecommendationId.description: The identifier of the bot recommendation being described.

failureReasons.description: If botRecommendationStatus is Failed, Amazon Lex explains why.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the bot recommendation was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the bot recommendation was last updated.

transcriptSourceSetting.description: The object representing the Amazon S3 bucket containing the transcript, as well as the associated metadata.

encryptionSetting.description: The object representing the passwords that were used to encrypt the data related to the bot recommendation results, as well as the KMS key ARN used to encrypt the associated metadata.

botRecommendationResults.description: The object representing the URL of the bot definition, the URL of the associated transcript and a statistical summary of the bot recommendation results.

botId.description: The unique bot ID of the replicated bot being monitored.

replicaRegion.description: The region of the replicated bot being monitored.

sourceRegion.description: The source region of the replicated bot being monitored.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time of the replicated bot being monitored.

botReplicaStatus.description: The operational status of the replicated bot being monitored.

failureReasons.description: The failure reasons the bot being monitored failed to replicate.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot for which the generation request was made.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot for which the generation request was made.

localeId.description: The locale of the bot for which the generation request was made.

generationId.description: The generation ID for which to return the generation details.

failureReasons.description: A list of reasons why the generation of bot resources through natural language description failed.

generationInputPrompt.description: The prompt used in the generation request.

generatedBotLocaleUrl.description: The Amazon S3 location of the generated bot locale configuration.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time at which the item was generated.

modelArn.description: The ARN of the model used to generate the bot resources.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time at which the generated item was updated.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the version.

botName.description: The name of the bot that contains the version.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that was described.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that has permission to access the bot version.

dataPrivacy.description: Data privacy settings for the bot version.

idleSessionTTLInSeconds.description: The number of seconds that a session with the bot remains active before it is discarded by Amazon Lex.

botStatus.description: The current status of the bot. When the status is Available, the bot version is ready for use.

failureReasons.description: If the botStatus is Failed, this contains a list of reasons that the version couldn't be built.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot version was created.

parentBotNetworks.description: A list of the networks to which the bot version you described belongs.

botType.description: The type of the bot in the version that was described.

botMembers.description: The members of bot network in the version that was described.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the custom vocabulary.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that contains the custom vocabulary to describe.

localeId.description: The locale that contains the custom vocabulary to describe.

customVocabularyStatus.description: The status of the custom vocabulary. If the status is Ready the custom vocabulary is ready to use.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the custom vocabulary was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the custom vocabulary was last updated.

exportId.description: The unique identifier of the described export.

resourceSpecification.description: The bot, bot ID, and optional locale ID of the exported bot or bot locale.

fileFormat.description: The file format used in the files that describe the resource.

exportStatus.description: The status of the export. When the status is Complete the export archive file is available for download.

failureReasons.description: If the exportStatus is failed, contains one or more reasons why the export could not be completed.

downloadUrl.description: A pre-signed S3 URL that points to the bot or bot locale archive. The URL is only available for 5 minutes after calling the DescribeExport operation.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the export was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The last date and time that the export was updated.

importId.description: The unique identifier of the described import.

resourceSpecification.description: The specifications of the imported bot, bot locale, or custom vocabulary.

importedResourceId.description: The unique identifier that Amazon Lex assigned to the resource created by the import.

mergeStrategy.description: The strategy used when there was a name conflict between the imported resource and an existing resource. When the merge strategy is FailOnConflict existing resources are not overwritten and the import fails.

importStatus.description: The status of the import process. When the status is Completed the resource is imported and ready for use.

failureReasons.description: If the importStatus field is Failed, this provides one or more reasons for the failure.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the import was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the import was last updated.

intentId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the intent when it was created.

intentDisplayName.description: The display name specified for the intent.

parentIntentSignature.description: The identifier of the built-in intent that this intent is derived from, if any.

dialogCodeHook.description: The Lambda function called during each turn of a conversation with the intent.

fulfillmentCodeHook.description: The Lambda function called when the intent is complete and ready for fulfillment.

slotPriorities.description: The list that determines the priority that slots should be elicited from the user.

intentConfirmationSetting.description: Prompts that Amazon Lex sends to the user to confirm completion of an intent.

intentClosingSetting.description: The response that Amazon Lex sends to when the intent is closed.

inputContexts.description: A list of contexts that must be active for the intent to be considered for sending to the user.

outputContexts.description: A list of contexts that are activated when the intent is fulfilled.

kendraConfiguration.description: Configuration information required to use the AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent intent.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the intent.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the intent.

localeId.description: The language and locale specified for the intent.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the intent was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the intent was last updated.

initialResponseSetting.description: Configuration setting for a response sent to the user before Amazon Lex starts eliciting slots.

qnAIntentConfiguration.description: Details about the configuration of the built-in Amazon.QnAIntent.

qInConnectIntentConfiguration.description: Qinconnect intent configuration details for the describe intent response.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy is attached to.

policy.description: The JSON structure that contains the resource policy. For more information about the contents of a JSON policy document, see IAM JSON policy reference .

revisionId.description: The current revision of the resource policy. Use the revision ID to make sure that you are updating the most current version of a resource policy when you add a policy statement to a resource, delete a resource, or update a resource.

slotId.description: The unique identifier generated for the slot.

slotTypeId.description: The identifier of the slot type that determines the values entered into the slot.

valueElicitationSetting.description: Prompts that Amazon Lex uses to elicit a value for the slot.

obfuscationSetting.description: Whether slot values are shown in Amazon CloudWatch logs. If the value is None, the actual value of the slot is shown in logs.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the slot.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the slot.

localeId.description: The language and locale specified for the slot.

intentId.description: The identifier of the intent associated with the slot.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the slot was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the slot was last updated.

multipleValuesSetting.description:
Indicates whether the slot accepts multiple values in a single utterance.

If the multipleValuesSetting is not set, the default value is false.

subSlotSetting.description: Specifications for the constituent sub slots and the expression for the composite slot.

slotTypeId.description: The unique identifier for the slot type.

slotTypeName.description: The name specified for the slot type.

description.description: The description specified for the slot type.

slotTypeValues.description: The values that the slot type can take. Includes any synonyms for the slot type values.

valueSelectionSetting.description: The strategy that Amazon Lex uses to choose a value from a list of possible values.

parentSlotTypeSignature.description: The built in slot type used as a parent to this slot type.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the slot type.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the slot type.

localeId.description: The language and locale specified for the slot type.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the slot type was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the slot type was last updated.

externalSourceSetting.description: Provides information about the external source of the slot type's definition.

testExecutionId.description: The execution Id for the test set execution.

creationDateTime.description: The execution creation date and time for the test set execution.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time of the last update for the execution.

testExecutionStatus.description: The test execution status for the test execution.

testSetId.description: The test set Id for the test set execution.

testSetName.description: The test set name of the test set execution.

target.description: The target bot for the test set execution details.

apiMode.description: Indicates whether we use streaming or non-streaming APIs are used for the test set execution. For streaming, StartConversation Amazon Lex Runtime API is used. Whereas for non-streaming, RecognizeUtterance and RecognizeText Amazon Lex Runtime API is used.

testExecutionModality.description: Indicates whether test set is audio or text.

failureReasons.description: Reasons for the failure of the test set execution.

testSetId.description: The test set Id for the test set response.

testSetName.description: The test set name of the test set.

modality.description: Indicates whether the test set is audio or text data.

roleArn.description: The roleARN used for any operation in the test set to access resources in the Amazon Web Services account.

numTurns.description: The total number of agent and user turn in the test set.

storageLocation.description: The Amazon S3 storage location for the test set data.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time for the test set data.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time for the last update of the test set data.

testSetDiscrepancyReportId.description: The unique identifier of the test set discrepancy report to describe.

testSetId.description: The test set Id for the test set discrepancy report.

creationDateTime.description: The time and date of creation for the test set discrepancy report.

target.description: The target bot location for the test set discrepancy report.

testSetDiscrepancyReportStatus.description: The status for the test set discrepancy report.

lastUpdatedDataTime.description: The date and time of the last update for the test set discrepancy report.

testSetDiscrepancyTopErrors.description: The top 200 error results from the test set discrepancy report.

testSetDiscrepancyRawOutputUrl.description: Pre-signed Amazon S3 URL to download the test set discrepancy report.

failureReasons.description: The failure report for the test set discrepancy report generation action.

testSetGenerationId.description: The unique identifier of the test set generation.

testSetGenerationStatus.description: The status for the test set generation.

failureReasons.description: The reasons the test set generation failed.

testSetId.description: The unique identifier for the test set created for the generated test set.

testSetName.description: The test set name for the generated test set.

description.description: The test set description for the test set generation.

storageLocation.description: The Amazon S3 storage location for the test set generation.

generationDataSource.description: The data source of the test set used for the test set generation.

roleArn.description: The roleARN of the test set used for the test set generation.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time for the test set generation.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time of the last update for the test set generation.

testExecutionId.description: The unique identifier of the completed test execution.

downloadArtifactsUrl.description: The pre-signed Amazon S3 URL to download completed test execution.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the utterances.

botAliasId.description: The identifier of the bot alias that contains the utterances. If you specified the bot version, the bot alias ID isn't returned.

botVersion.description: The identifier of the bot version that contains the utterances. If you specified the bot alias, the bot version isn't returned.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale that the utterances are in.

aggregationDuration.description: The time period used to aggregate the utterance data.

aggregationWindowStartTime.description: The date and time that the aggregation window begins. Only data collected after this time is returned in the results.

aggregationWindowEndTime.description: The date and time that the aggregation window ends. Only data collected between the start time and the end time are returned in the results.

aggregationLastRefreshedDateTime.description:
The last date and time that the aggregated data was collected. The time period depends on the length of the aggregation window.

  • Hours - for 1 hour time window, every half hour; otherwise every hour.

  • Days - every 6 hours

  • Weeks - for a one week time window, every 12 hours; otherwise, every day

aggregatedUtterancesSummaries.description: Summaries of the aggregated utterance data. Each response contains information about the number of times that the utterance was seen during the time period, whether it was detected or missed, and when it was seen during the time period.

nextToken.description: A token that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the ListAggregatedUtterances operation. If the nextToken field is present, you send the contents as the nextToken parameter of a ListAggregatedUtterances operation request to get the next page of results.

botId.description: The unique bot ID of the replicated bot created from the source bot alias.

sourceRegion.description: The source region of the replicated bot created from the source bot alias.

replicaRegion.description: The secondary region of the replicated bot created from the source bot alias.

botAliasReplicaSummaries.description: The summary information of the replicated bot created from the source bot alias.

nextToken.description: The next token for the replicated bots created from the source bot alias.

If the response from the ListIntentMetrics operation contains more results than specified in the maxResults parameter, a token is returned in the response.

Use the returned token in the nextToken parameter of a ListIntentMetrics request to return the next page of results. For a complete set of results, call the ListIntentMetrics operation until the nextToken returned in the response is null.

nextToken.description:
If the response from the ListUtteranceAnalyticsData operation contains more results than specified in the maxResults parameter, a token is returned in the response.

Use the returned token in the nextToken parameter of a ListUtteranceAnalyticsData request to return the next page of results. For a complete set of results, call the ListUtteranceAnalyticsData operation until the nextToken returned in the response is null.

utterances.description: A list of objects, each of which contains information about an utterance in a user session with your bot.

botId.description: The identifier for the bot for which you retrieved utterance metrics.

nextToken.description:
If the response from the ListUtteranceMetrics operation contains more results than specified in the maxResults parameter, a token is returned in the response.

Use the returned token in the nextToken parameter of a ListUtteranceMetrics request to return the next page of results. For a complete set of results, call the ListUtteranceMetrics operation until the nextToken returned in the response is null.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot associated with the transcripts that you are searching.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot containing the transcripts that you are searching.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale of the transcripts to search. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported languages

botRecommendationId.description: The unique identifier of the bot recommendation associated with the transcripts to search.

nextIndex.description: A index that indicates whether there are more results to return in a response to the SearchAssociatedTranscripts operation. If the nextIndex field is present, you send the contents as the nextIndex parameter of a SearchAssociatedTranscriptsRequest operation to get the next page of results.

associatedTranscripts.description: The object that contains the associated transcript that meet the criteria you specified.

totalResults.description: The total number of transcripts returned by the search.
